description_long: This is an adult male figure standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a fitted short-sleeve shirt and matching pants, both appearing to be made from a soft, flexible fabric. The figure is barefoot, with toes and feet clearly visible, and his hands are open and relaxed at the ends of his outstretched arms. His facial features are well-defined, with a neatly groomed beard and short, closely cropped hair. The body proportions are realistic, and the overall build is athletic and healthy. No accessories or carried objects are present, and the clothing is simple and unadorned.
description: An adult male in a T-pose, wearing a fitted short-sleeve shirt and pants, barefoot, with short hair and a beard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and outstretched arms with open hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and leg, with the ear and side of the head visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with arms extended to the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and leg, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
